title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 421.025 - Resale of bedding, previously used material label required
text:
421.025.  Resale of bedding, previously used material label required. — The repairer or renovator of any bedding which is subsequently sold shall affix the previously used material label, which shall be attached to the article before delivery to the owner.
(L. 1999 H.B. 316, et al. § 11)
